title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Ecom Express Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Ecom Express Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Distribution Manager looking for your next big career move? Ecom Express Asia Pacific Associates in Allahabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Ecom Express Asia Pacific Associates:
Ecom Express Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ecom Express Asia Pacific Associates!
